name: cafefams-backend
description: Café Fams AI Chatbot Backend — v1.5.1: adds specific diagnostic guidance for the Render+Supabase IPv6/ENETUNREACH connection issue (fix is a DATABASE_URL config change to Supabase's connection pooler, not a code change). v1.5.0: fixed silent data-loss bug (RLS policies blocked all Supabase writes), boot-time DB write self-test + Telegram alerting. v1.4.0: multi-tenant resolver, payment/price integrity, rate limiting, prompt-injection guardrails, memory/SSE fixes
